install: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y postgresql-client xz-utils && curl -LsSf https://astral.sh/uv/install.sh | sh -s -- -y && $HOME/.local/bin/uv sync --all-packages && mkdir -p $HOME/.local/bin && (case "$(dpkg --print-architecture)" in amd64) T=x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu;; arm64) T=aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu;; *) T=;; esac && [ -n "$T" ] && curl -fsSL "https://github.com/moonrepo/moon/releases/download/v2.4.3/moon_cli-${T}.tar.xz" | tar -xJ -C $HOME/.local/bin --strip-components=1 "moon_cli-${T}/moon" "moon_cli-${T}/moonx" && chmod +x $HOME/.local/bin/moon || echo 'unsupported arch; call uv/dbmate directly')
